query:
SELECT id, name, location, priority, sector,
  LEFT(overview, 300) AS overview_snippet,
  equipmentSignals,
  matchedBusinessLines
FROM projects
WHERE (
  location LIKE '%NSW%' OR location LIKE '%New South Wales%'
  OR location LIKE '%VIC%' OR location LIKE '%Victoria%'
  OR location LIKE '%SA%' OR location LIKE '%South Australia%'
  OR location LIKE '%TAS%' OR location LIKE '%Tasmania%'
  OR location LIKE '%Sydney%' OR location LIKE '%Melbourne%'
  OR location LIKE '%Adelaide%' OR location LIKE '%Hobart%'
  OR location LIKE '%Newcastle%' OR location LIKE '%Wollongong%'
  OR location LIKE '%Geelong%' OR location LIKE '%Launceston%'
)
AND (
  name LIKE '%blast%' OR name LIKE '%paint%' OR name LIKE '%coating%'
  OR name LIKE '%surface preparation%' OR name LIKE '%corrosion%'
  OR name LIKE '%refurbish%' OR name LIKE '%maintenance%'
  OR name LIKE '%shutdown%' OR name LIKE '%turnaround%'
  OR overview LIKE '%abrasive blast%' OR overview LIKE '%sandblast%'
  OR overview LIKE '%grit blast%' OR overview LIKE '%blast and paint%'
  OR overview LIKE '%surface preparation%' OR overview LIKE '%protective coating%'
  OR overview LIKE '%corrosion%' OR overview LIKE '%asset integrity%'
  OR overview LIKE '%shutdown%' OR overview LIKE '%turnaround%'
  OR overview LIKE '%refinery%'
)
ORDER BY priority DESC, name ASC
LIMIT 20;

  OR location LIKE '%SA%' OR location LIKE '%South Australia%'

  OR location LIKE '%Sydney%' OR location LIKE '%Melbourne%'
  OR location LIKE '%Adelaide%' OR location LIKE '%Hobart%'
  OR location LIKE '%Newcastle%' OR location LIKE '%Wollongong%'
  OR location LIKE '%Geelong%' OR location LIKE '%Launceston%'
)
AND (
  name LIKE '%blast%' OR name LIKE '%paint%' OR name LIKE '%coating%'
  OR name LIKE '%surface preparation%' OR name LIKE '%corrosion%'
  OR name LIKE '%refurbish%' OR name LIKE '%maintenance%'
  OR name LIKE '%shutdown%' OR name LIKE '%turnaround%'
  OR overview LIKE '%abrasive blast%' OR overview LIKE '%sandblast%'
  OR overview LIKE '%grit blast%' OR overview LIKE '%blast and paint%'
  OR overview LIKE '%surface preparation%' OR overview LIKE '%protective coating%'
  OR overview LIKE '%corrosion%' OR overview LIKE '%asset integrity%'
  OR overview LIKE '%shutdown%' OR overview LIKE '%turnaround%'
  OR overview LIKE '%refinery%'

ORDER BY priority DESC, name ASC
LIMIT 20;

rows.name: Geelong Oil Refinery Operations
rows.overview_snippet: Viva Energy's oil refinery in Geelong continues to produce diesel and jet fuel despite a recent fire incident. The facility is a critical energy infrastructure asset.

rows.name: Viva Energy Geelong Refinery Operations
rows.overview_snippet: Viva Energy's oil refinery in Geelong continues to produce diesel and jet fuel despite a recent fire incident. The article confirms ongoing operations.

rows.name: Adelaide Desalination Plant Refurbishment
rows.overview_snippet: Ongoing refurbishment and replacement of critical components at the Adelaide Desalination Plant to ensure its operational longevity and efficiency.

rows.name: Lismore Pump Station Refurbishments
rows.overview_snippet: The NSW Government is detailing pump station refurbishments in Lismore to guard against future floods, including the Magellan Street pump station.

rows.name: ASC Submarine Maintenance and Capability
rows.overview_snippet: Ongoing submarine maintenance and capability upgrades at Osborne, SA. Includes Collins Class sustainment and AUKUS submarine preparation. Requires high-pressure compressed air for hull testing and maintenance.
rows.equipmentSignals: ["High-pressure compressed air for submarine hull testing (350+ psi)", "Portable power for dry dock maintenance operations", "Dewatering pumps for submarine dock facilities", "Industrial lighting for confined space work"]

rows.name: Inland Rail Project - Broadford Bridge Demolition
rows.overview_snippet: Progress on the Inland Rail project in Victoria surged over the weekend as a 40-hour shutdown of the Albury line allowed for the demolition of the old Short Street bridge at Broadford.

rows.name: Melbourne CBD intersection tram system maintenance
rows.location: Spencer and Bourke Street intersection, Melbourne CBD, VIC
rows.overview_snippet: The Victorian Government is undertaking major maintenance for Melbourne’s tram systems at the intersection of Spencer and Bourke Street. Crews will replace tram tracks and road surfaces, and install new poles and overhead wires.
rows.equipmentSignals: ["Portable air compressors (for road breaking, track work)", "Generators (for power tools, lighting)", "Lighting towers (for night work)"]
